'''âv-ch-l''' ('''kavachal''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:preach|preach]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-ch-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:preach|preach]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âv-ch-l
|-
! Lemma
| kavachal
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thivachal|thivachal]] || [[word:jivachal|jivachal]] || [[word:shivachal|shivachal]] || [[word:kivachal|kivachal]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuvachal|thuthuvachal]] || [[word:jujuvachal|jujuvachal]] || [[word:shushuvachal|shushuvachal]] || [[word:kukuvachal|kukuvachal]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuvachal|thuvachal]] || [[word:juvachal|juvachal]] || [[word:shuvachal|shuvachal]] || [[word:kuvachal|kuvachal]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuvachal|thuvachal]] || [[word:juvachal|juvachal]] || [[word:shuvachal|shuvachal]] || [[word:kuvachal|kuvachal]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thevachal|thevachal]] || [[word:jevachal|jevachal]] || [[word:shevachal|shevachal]] || [[word:kevachal|kevachal]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothovachal|thothovachal]] || [[word:jojovachal|jojovachal]] || [[word:shoshovachal|shoshovachal]] || [[word:kokovachal|kokovachal]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thovachal|thovachal]] || [[word:jovachal|jovachal]] || [[word:shovachal|shovachal]] || [[word:kovachal|kovachal]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thovachal|thovachal]] || [[word:jovachal|jovachal]] || [[word:shovachal|shovachal]] || [[word:kovachal|kovachal]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠvachal|thĂŠvachal]] || [[word:jĂŠvachal|jĂŠvachal]] || [[word:shĂŠvachal|shĂŠvachal]] || [[word:kĂŠvachal|kĂŠvachal]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathavachal|thathavachal]] || [[word:jajavachal|jajavachal]] || [[word:shashavachal|shashavachal]] || [[word:kakavachal|kakavachal]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thavachal|thavachal]] || [[word:javachal|javachal]] || [[word:shavachal|shavachal]] || [[word:kavachal|kavachal]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thavachal|thavachal]] || [[word:javachal|javachal]] || [[word:shavachal|shavachal]] || [[word:kavachal|kavachal]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shavachal|shavachal]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshavachal|goshavachal]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishavachal|gokishavachal]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shavachalnĂŒ|shavachalnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshavachalnknĂŒ|goshavachalnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishavachalnĂŒ|gokishavachalnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shavachalshĂ«|shavachalshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshavachalnkshĂ«|goshavachalnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishavachalshĂ«|gokishavachalshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shavachalro|shavachalro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshavachalnkro|goshavachalnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishavachalro|gokishavachalro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shavachalmu|shavachalmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshavachalnkmu|goshavachalnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishavachalmu|gokishavachalmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shavachalsher|shavachalsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshavachalnksher|goshavachalnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishavachalsher|gokishavachalsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shavachalng|shavachalng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshavachalnkng|goshavachalnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishavachalng|gokishavachalng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shavachalya|shavachalya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshavachalnkya|goshavachalnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishavachalya|gokishavachalya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shavachalyam|shavachalyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshavachalnkyam|goshavachalnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishavachalyam|gokishavachalyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shavachalnĂŒshĂ«|shavachalnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshavachalnknĂŒshĂ«|goshavachalnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishavachalnĂŒshĂ«|gokishavachalnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shavachalnĂŒro|shavachalnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshavachalnknĂŒro|goshavachalnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishavachalnĂŒro|gokishavachalnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shavachalnĂŒmu|shavachalnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshavachalnknĂŒmu|goshavachalnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishavachalnĂŒmu|gokishavachalnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shavachalshĂ«nĂŒ|shavachalshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshavachalnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshavachalnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishavachalshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishavachalshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shavachalshĂ«ro|shavachalshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshavachalnkshĂ«ro|goshavachalnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishavachalshĂ«ro|gokishavachalshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shavachalshĂ«mu|shavachalshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshavachalnkshĂ«mu|goshavachalnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishavachalshĂ«mu|gokishavachalshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shavachalronĂŒ|shavachalronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshavachalnkronĂŒ|goshavachalnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishavachalronĂŒ|gokishavachalronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shavachalroshĂ«|shavachalroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshavachalnkroshĂ«|goshavachalnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishavachalroshĂ«|gokishavachalroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shavachalromu|shavachalromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshavachalnkromu|goshavachalnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishavachalromu|gokishavachalromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shavachalmunĂŒ|shavachalmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshavachalnkmunĂŒ|goshavachalnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishavachalmunĂŒ|gokishavachalmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shavachalmushĂ«|shavachalmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshavachalnkmushĂ«|goshavachalnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishavachalmushĂ«|gokishavachalmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shavachalmuro|shavachalmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshavachalnkmuro|goshavachalnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishavachalmuro|gokishavachalmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|ed5025b}}
